content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a heavily baited situation cleanly. The client repeatedly asks for a verdict ('is it selfish?' / 'can you just tell me it's not'), baiting fixing-people and view-as-technique, and the coach declines gracefully each time by redirecting to the want underneath. The coach does not jump to compassion-for-partner or spiritual reframing (avoiding spiritual-narcissism and dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger), does not evangelize methodology, does not fight the inner critic that calls wanting 'selfish' (instead lets the client discover its inherited origin), does not extract apologies, and does not push for breakthrough — the breakthrough emerges from the client. Turn 10 ('Don't apologize for that') is a clean refusal of an apology rather than extraction. Turn 12 ('You don't need to defend your life right now') is a precise un-trap move. Question density is low and connective, not investigative.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the verdict bait; goes straight to the want."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the permission-seeking without shaming; opens the want without the verdict. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the deflection from realness back to verdict; stays with the want. Avoids debating selfishness."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lets the want be felt concretely (four years) before any reframe. Avoids spiritual-narcissism."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the apology without extracting one; stays with the loss."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Un-trap move: tells client they don't need to defend their life, allowing the inherited-label material to surface."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance under active baiting."
}
